name: hb_3_20
requirements: As part of your analysis, rank all Hebei stations by AQI at 2025-06-11 09:00. Compute and store: top5_station_ids (list of the 5 highest, int), most_polluted_station_id (int), most_polluted_aqi (float).

turns.query: Help me analyze the hourly variation trends of the 5 most severely polluted stations province-wide at 2025-06-11 09:00:00.
